title: At the Restaurant
description: Practice ordering food and drink at a Czech restaurant: asking for the menu, ordering dishes, and paying the bill in real conversations.

exercises.prompt: What does 'Dám si...' mean when ordering?

data.question_en: What does 'Dám si...' mean when ordering food?
data.explanation: Dám si... = I'll have... / I would like to order... Common phrase when ordering at a restaurant.

exercises.prompt: Translate 'I would like a beer, please' to Czech.

data.source: I would like a beer, please
data.grammar_note: Chtěl bych... = I would like... (masculine speaker). Chtěla bych... (feminine speaker).

data.explanation: Dám si guláš = I'll have the goulash. Co si dáte? = What will you have? (formal/plural)
Chtěl bych = I would like (male speaker). svíčková → accusative svíčkovou. knedlíky stay the same (plural accusative = nominative).

exercises.prompt: Which is a traditional Czech dish?

data.question_cz: Které z těchto jídel je tradiční český pokrm?
data.question_en: Which is a traditional Czech dish?
data.explanation: Svíčková (na smetaně) = marinated beef in cream sauce, a classic Czech dish served with knedlíky (dumplings).

exercises.prompt: Translate 'Can I have the bill, please?' to Czech.

data.source: Can I have the bill, please?
data.grammar_note: Platit = to pay. Účet = the bill/check. Common ways to ask: 'Platit, prosím!' or 'Zaplatím, prosím.'

exercises.prompt: Complete: the waiter asks if you want anything else.

data.explanation: Ještě něco? = Anything else? Common response: Ne, děkuji, platit prosím = No thanks, the bill please.

exercises.prompt: Listen and write the Czech dish name.

data.note: Fried cheese with fries — a popular Czech pub dish.

data.question_en: What does 'účet' mean in a restaurant?
data.explanation: účet = the bill/check. 'Účet, prosím' = The bill, please.

data.sentence: Číšník: Co ___ (you will have)? Host: ___ (I'll have) ___ (fried cheese) a ___ (beer).
data.explanation: Co si dáte? = What will you have? (formal). Dám si smažený sýr = I'll have fried cheese.

exercises.answer_key: si dáte Dám si smažený sýr pivo

exercises.prompt: Complete the full restaurant ordering exchange.

data.scenario: Ordering a full meal at a Czech restaurant

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: Dám si ___ (svíčková with dumplings) a jedno pivo, prosím.

data.explanation: svíčková → accusative svíčkovou. 'To je všechno' = that's all/everything.

exercises.answer_key: svíčkovou s knedlíkem to je všechno
